creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Comment on attachment 249234
Patch for libdjinterop

Looks like the commits in question have been included in the 0.20.2 release.

As of 2024-05-25, we even have 0.21.0 release. 

I was thinking about giving audio/mixxx the possibility to use system-wide libdjinterop, but mixxx want's to have 0.20.2 only.

https://github.com/mixxxdj/mixxx/blob/3c7020842e0fe0a3e2e15bfa65c886dbf52dbbc3/CMakeLists.txt#L2283-L2285
